strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and community teaching through workshops
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff level, not Principal or Director-level IC as required
Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise — no shipped AI products, platforms, or recognized AI work
No Master's or PhD in AI, and no large-scale cloud platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs Principal/Director IC bar
Long engineering tenure with founder/entrepreneurial experience

response.justification: The candidate has the raw years of experience and a solid generalist engineering background with some recent AI-adjacent work on MCP and agent tooling, plus founder experience with GISCollective. However, the role demands a Principal/Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms, and cloud strategy depth — none of which are clearly evidenced. The trajectory is senior IC, not principal-level strategic leadership.
